validation_title: Phase 1 Field Extraction - Bug Fix Impact Validation

summary.objective: Verify that Phase 2b bug fixes do not negatively impact Phase 1 field extraction
summary.test_method: Re-ran Phase 1 test with identical test harness 11 minutes after initial test

phase1_extraction_stability.description: No regressions or errors detected in Phase 1 extraction
phase1_extraction_stability.evidence: Identical results for 5 shared listings between tests

bug_fix_impact.description: Phase 2b bug fixes do not affect Phase 1 logic
bug_fix_impact.reason: Phase 1 functions were not modified; bug fixes targeted Phase 2a/2b only

data_variability.description: Success rate variations are due to API data differences, not extraction issues
data_variability.evidence: Different random listings → different field availability patterns

has_parking.cause_of_change: Different random listings; extraction logic unchanged

has_garage.cause_of_change: Not in API data for either test batch

area_total.cause_of_change: Better area_total availability in apartment-heavy retest batch

year_built.cause_of_change: Not in API data for either test batch

shared_listings_validation.interpretation: Extraction logic is stable and deterministic. Same inputs produce identical outputs.

enrichment_rate_analysis.interpretation: Increase is due to higher area_total availability in retest batch (more apartments), not extraction improvements

area_total.recommendation: Deploy with understanding that rate varies by property type

has_parking.recommendation: Deploy with documentation on expected availability

shared_listings_match.test: Do identical listings produce identical extractions?

type_safety.test: Are extracted values the correct types?

null_handling.details: Undefined fields are properly returned as undefined, not errors

immediate_actions: ✓ Deploy Phase 2b bug fixes - validation confirms no Phase 1 impact
✓ Document expected success rate ranges per field
short_term_improvements: Run longer test suite (50-100 listings) for stable baseline metrics
Implement stratified sampling by property type for consistent testing
Add logging/monitoring for field availability patterns
long_term_enhancements: Source year_built and garage from alternative providers
Build region-specific field availability heat maps
Monitor API changes to field availability over time

conclusion.finding: Phase 1 field extraction is stable with no regressions from Phase 2b bug fixes
conclusion.deployment_decision: APPROVED - Safe to deploy Phase 2b bug fixes to production
